prompt: show me the desk from the doorway, then orbit left and rise

presets.name: Entrance View
presets.description: Safe establishing shot from the doorway aimed into the room.

presets.name: Workbench Orbit
presets.description: Three-quarter view that circles the main subject area.

presets.name: Overhead Sweep
presets.description: High angle shot for spatial understanding and layout review.

promptPlan.name: Desk Focus
promptPlan.description: Prompt-derived focal view toward the main work surface.

promptPlan.name: Orbit Move
promptPlan.description: Prompt-derived lateral orbit shot around the subject.

promptPlan.name: Rise Shot
promptPlan.description: Prompt-derived rising finish shot for overview and reveal.
